## Checklist

- [ ] I forked the repo and this PR targets `main` from my branch
- [ ] `cd client && npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `cd client && npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] The server still boots (`cd server && npm run dev`) if I touched backend code
- [ ] I did **not** commit any secrets or a real `.env`
- [ ] My change is focused (one logical change) and follows the existing code style
